name: prism-alerting
description: Yarn script aliases for Python alert workers in ../api (see api/prism_app/alert_workers/)

scripts.alert-worker: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.worker.alert_runner threshold'
scripts.aa-storm-alert-worker: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.worker.alert_runner aa-storm'
scripts.aa-flood-alert-worker: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.worker.alert_runner aa-flood'
scripts.check-alerts-db-contract: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.ci.alert_db_contract'
scripts.smoke-alerts-db-pool: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.ci.alert_db_smoke'
scripts.smoke-alerting-workers: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.worker.alert_runner smoke'
scripts.docker-alert: bash -lc 'cd ../api && PYTHONPATH=. poetry run python -m prism_app.worker.alert_runner threshold'
